title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 20 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 20 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 20 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 20/06/2024
DCE iron ore ﬂuctuated repeatedly， the main contract closed 824.5，an decrease of0.36% throughout the day; Traders followed the market trend to sell; steel mills were mostly cautious and not very active in purchasing. PBF at Shandong port dealt 825-830 yuan/mt; increased 5 yuan/mt over yesterday.. PBF at Tangshan port dealt 835-850 yuan/mt; increased 5 yuan/mt over yesterday.
